title: BEM-857 route 856
objective:
Run script:
"""
sep='\n'
for d in ['governance/state','governance/reports','governance/tasks/pending','governance/handoff','governance/transport']:
    Path(d).mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
created='2026-05-24 | 11:53 (UTC+3)'
def load(p):
    p=Path(p)
    try: return json.loads(p.read_text(errors='ignore')) if p.exists() else {}
    except Exception as exc: return {'_load_error':str(exc)}
prev=load('governance/state/bem856_execute_bem855_route.json')
ps=prev.get('status','unknown')
if ps=='protocol_result_created_from_bem844_response':
    status='next_finalize_or_repair_protocol_decision'
    next_action='read protocol result decision and finalize/repair'
elif ps=='inspect_writer_commit_path_required':
    status='next_patch_dispatcher_commit_response_path'
    next_action='patch dispatcher commit script/git add to include bem844_claude_response.md and reports after ensure step'
elif ps in ['dispatch_probe_created_wait_tick','runtime_probe_created_wait_tick']:
    status='next_tick_probe'
    next_action='tick and verify probe result'
else:
    status='next_diagnose_response_absence'
    next_action='inspect BEM-850/BEM-856 state, dispatcher workflow, commit script and queue result'
state={'bem':'BEM-857','status':status,'previous_status':ps,'next_action':next_action,'created_at':created}
Path('governance/state/bem857_route_after_bem856.json').write_text(json.dumps(state,indent=2,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
Path('governance/reports/bem857_route_after_bem856.md').write_text('# BEM-857 | Route After BEM-856 | '+status+sep+sep+json.dumps(state,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
Path('governance/tasks/pending/bem857_next.md').write_text('Next: '+next_action+sep+'Operator relay forbidden. Report does not stop development.'+sep)
Path('governance/handoff/GPT_NEXT_ACTION.md').write_text('# GPT NEXT ACTION | BEM-857'+sep+sep+'Status: '+status+sep+'Next: '+next_action+sep)
with Path('governance/transport/results.jsonl').open('a',encoding='utf-8') as h: h.write(json.dumps(state,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
changed_files.extend(['governance/state/bem857_route_after_bem856.json','governance/reports/bem857_route_after_bem856.md','governance/tasks/pending/bem857_next.md','governance/handoff/GPT_NEXT_ACTION.md','governance/transport/results.jsonl'])
ops_applied.append('Routed after BEM-856 to either finalize protocol or patch missing response/commit path')
